about.label: What's behind this?
about.lead: You're not reading a CV. Every answer here is generated live by a language model, grounded in a private, evolving picture of how I actually think and work — and it only ever talks about Oscar.

points.title: Live, not pre-written
points.body: Each reply is composed in the moment from a private brief about my work — never read off a fixed page.

points.title: A model of me, not a file
points.body: The source isn't a frozen document. It's a structured, digital version of how I reason, decide, and build that I refine continuously — it evolves as I do.

points.title: And I rely on it myself
points.body: Beyond this page, I consult that same digital version of myself to pressure-test decisions, revisit my own past reasoning, and move faster on real work.

about.openSource: Open source. See how it's built.

suggestedQuestions: Tell me about a hard technical decision you made
How do you approach scaling a team?
Are you open to new opportunities?
